FFlagLuaAppLayoutParamsInContext2.mechanism: Adjusts layout parameters for app interfaces in a specific context.
FFlagLuaAppLayoutParamsInContext2.purpose: Enhances the visual experience and usability of the app for players.

FFlagUseGetAdPlacementsRequest.mechanism: Requests specific ad placements from the server.
FFlagUseGetAdPlacementsRequest.purpose: Ensures players see more relevant ads based on their interests.

FFlagAppShortcutBarFixHoldIconFlash_Stag.mechanism: Fixes an issue where icons flash when held down.
FFlagAppShortcutBarFixHoldIconFlash_Stag.purpose: Provides a smoother and more consistent experience when using shortcuts.

DFStringInternalTestGroupIds_Staged.mechanism: Identifies different test groups for internal testing.
DFStringInternalTestGroupIds_Staged.purpose: Allows for better testing of features before they are released to players.

FFlagMemoryPrioritizationRaceConditionBu.mechanism: Fixes a bug that caused memory management issues when multiple processes accessed memory simultaneously.
FFlagMemoryPrioritizationRaceConditionBu.purpose: Improves game stability and performance by reducing crashes and lag during gameplay.
